mapper.select: SELECT c.id AS challengeId, c.title AS title, c.start_date AS startDate, c.end_date AS endDate, c.type AS type, c.target_count AS goalCount, c.target_amount AS goalAmount, cp.status AS myStatus, cp.my_fee AS myDeposit, cp.challenge_count AS actualCount, cp.challenge_amount AS actualAmount, COUNT(DISTINCT cp2.id) AS totalParticipants, SUM(CASE WHEN cp2.status IN ('PARTICIPATING','SUCCESS') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS survivorCount, SUM(cp2.my_fee) AS totalDeposit, SUM(CASE WHEN cp2.status = 'FAIL' THEN cp2.my_fee ELSE 0 END) AS forfeitedDeposit, CASE WHEN c.end_date < CURRENT_DATE THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS ended FROM Challenge c INNER JOIN ChallengeParticipation cp ON c.id = cp.challenge_id LEFT JOIN ChallengeParticipation cp2 ON c.id = cp2.challenge_id WHERE cp.user_id = #{userId} AND c.id = #{challengeId} GROUP BY c.id, c.title, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.type, c.target_count, c.target_amount, cp.status, cp.my_fee, cp.challenge_count, cp.challenge_amount
